## Describe the bug

1. Run command '...'
2. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- Architecture: [e.g. arm64, amd64]
- Codex Sweet Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
- Codex CLI Version: [run `codex --version`]
